raw_consumer_statement:
Today on XX/XX/2024, at XXXX XXXX  I was contacted by XXXX XXXX XXXX claiming to be American express and claiming that I had an account that had recently purchased a large amount of firearms. Said account was allegedly opened up earlier in the year in May and opened up in XXXX and I have not been to XXXX since I was a child. 
This was immediately suspicious because I very regularly track my credit reports and there has been no hard pulls on my credit for opening up a new account for many years since when I last opened up a bunch for the sake of building credit. 
I told them that I had an urgent appointment to get to and to give me a call back number, of course they did not and instead asked for a time to call me back while urging me that if I did not resolve this immediately that I would be liable for the purchases. We arranged a XXXX call back time and I immediately contacted AMEX support directly from my mobile app. They confirmed that I had no new accounts and that the only open account I have is my skymiles card that was unrelated to the scam call and I could see in the app had no new purchases on it. 
Anyway, the scam phone number again was XXXX XXXX XXXX.
